Description: AI models generate factually incorrect or misleading outputs that could impact federal decision-making
Control Requirements:
- Implement confidence scoring thresholds
- Human-in-the-loop validation for critical outputs
- Regular accuracy benchmarking
- Prompt engineering guidelines
Evidence Required:
- Model performance metrics
- Accuracy test results
- Incident reports
- User feedback logs

Description: Sensitive personal or health information exposed through model training data or outputs
Control Requirements:
- Data classification and labeling
- DLP policies for AI systems
- Input/output filtering
- Data minimization reviews
Evidence Required:
- Data inventory
- DLP scan results
- Privacy impact assessments
- Training data audits

Description: Malicious prompts bypass security controls to extract sensitive data or manipulate outputs
Control Requirements:
- Input validation and sanitization
- Rate limiting and anomaly detection
- Prompt filtering rules
- Security monitoring alerts
Evidence Required:
- Security incident logs
- WAF/firewall logs
- Penetration test results
- Prompt audit trails

Description: AI model accuracy decreases over time due to data drift or environmental changes
Control Requirements:
- Model monitoring dashboards
- Automated drift detection
- Retraining schedule (quarterly)
- Performance baselines
Evidence Required:
- Model metrics trends
- Drift detection reports
- Retraining records
- Performance benchmarks

Description: Google Vertex AI service outage impacts agency operations
Control Requirements:
- Multi-region deployment
- Fallback procedures
- SLA monitoring (99%+)
- Incident response plan
Evidence Required:
- Uptime reports
- SLA compliance metrics
- Incident tickets
- DR test results

Description: Failure to meet HITRUST r2/AI2 or FedRAMP requirements for AI systems
Control Requirements:
- Control implementation tracking
- Regular compliance assessments
- Policy enforcement
- Audit preparation
Evidence Required:
- Control evidence packages
- Assessment reports
- Policy attestations
- Audit findings

Description: Unauthorized users gain access to AI models or training data
Control Requirements:
- IAM policies (least privilege)
- MFA enforcement
- Access reviews (quarterly)
- Audit logging
Evidence Required:
- Access logs
- IAM configuration
- Access review reports
- Authentication logs

Description: AI models exhibit discriminatory bias affecting federal service delivery
Control Requirements:
- Bias testing protocols
- Fairness metrics monitoring
- Diverse training datasets
- Regular bias audits
Evidence Required:
- Bias test results
- Fairness metrics
- Dataset composition
- Demographic impact analysis

Description: Uncontrolled AI usage leads to budget overruns
Control Requirements:
- Usage quotas and alerts
- Cost monitoring dashboards
- Budget forecasting
- Usage optimization reviews
Evidence Required:
- Cost reports
- Usage analytics
- Budget variance reports
- Optimization recommendations

Description: AI outputs violate intellectual property or copyright laws
Control Requirements:
- Content filtering policies
- Copyright screening tools
- Legal review process
- Usage policies
Evidence Required:
- Legal reviews
- Content scan results
- Policy acknowledgments
- Incident reports

Description: Google Vertex/Gemini updates introduce vulnerabilities or backdoors
Control Requirements:
- Vendor security assessments
- Change notification monitoring
- Security bulletin tracking
- Patch management
Evidence Required:
- Vendor assessments
- Security bulletins
- Change logs
- Patch records

Description: AI-specific security incidents not properly detected or responded to
Control Requirements:
- AI incident response procedures
- Detection rules for AI threats
- Tabletop exercises (annual)
- Alert correlation
Evidence Required:
- IR procedures
- Incident logs
- Exercise reports
- Alert configurations

Description: Missing or incomplete AI model cards and documentation
Control Requirements:
- Model card templates
- Documentation standards
- Review checklists
- Version control
Evidence Required:
- Model cards
- Technical documentation
- Review records
- Approval workflows

Description: AI training data retained beyond policy limits or regulatory requirements
Control Requirements:
- Retention policies
- Automated data deletion
- Retention monitoring
- Compliance tracking
Evidence Required:
- Retention schedules
- Deletion logs
- Compliance reports
- Data inventory

Description: AI API endpoints exposed without proper authentication or rate limiting
Control Requirements:
- API gateway controls
- Authentication requirements
- Rate limiting policies
- API inventory
Evidence Required:
- API configurations
- Authentication logs
- Rate limit metrics
- Security scans
